hints.text: Developed **city-state** — clean & orderly; divided main roads w/ **B&W curbs + double yellow outer lines** + tall apartment blocks (often all you need)
Street signs = **green, rounded edges, distinct white font** (one unique nationwide format)
Plates mostly **black w/ white text** (MY/ID also black, but their letters split into 2–3 sections; Singapore's don't)
Directional signs green + English; expressways have **3-letter codes** (e.g. TPE); road signs sit on a **square white background** (unique)
**Rain trees** along main roads; warnings painted large on the road (famous **"HUMP AHEAD"**)
Buses mostly **lime-green**; bus stops protected by concrete **black-and-yellow warning-band bollards**
Traffic lights on a **curved perforated metal sheet**
Streets named after their **neighbourhood** (appears fast on the map, e.g. Ang Mo Kio); Sentosa = resort feel; Tuas = industrial cranes/containers
